nodes.name: 山鹧鸪属
nodes.summary: 山鹧鸪属（Arborophila）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联18种鸟类，如环颈山鹧鸪、四川山鹧鸪、红胸山鹧鸪等18种鸟类。

nodes.name: 马来山鹧鸪
nodes.summary: 马来山鹧鸪（Malayan partridge，学名 Arborophila campbelli），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入雉科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于马来西亚半岛、國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄、马来半岛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、非法猎捕。
nodes.shortSummary: 马来山鹧鸪（学名：Arborophila campbelli），是鸡形目雉科的一种鸟类。 马来山鹧鸪体重约336克，翼长约129.5毫米，嘴峰长约21.9毫米，喙宽度约5.6毫米，喙厚度约7.5毫米，跗蹠长约40.4毫米，尾长约52毫米。马来山鹧鸪在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密…
locations: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄

nodes.name: 鸡形目

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: 2024. It is relatively reclusive, and is found throughout highland forest habitats in Peninsular Malaysia. This bird primarily inhabits developed forests containing lush undergrowth, and is known to feed on fruits of rattan palms and the creeping plant Pratia begoniaefolia, along with termites and gastropods. It exhibits mottled brown, black, gray and beige coloring, with distinctive white auricular patches. Despite its decreasing population, the Malayan partridge is relatively unsusceptible to threats such as habitat loss, as its range largely consists of protected areas. Therefore, the International Union for Conservation of Nature has assessed it as "Least Concern."

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This partridge is found in certain areas of the Malay Peninsula. It is known to reside in the countries of Malaysia and Thailand, and vagrancy has not been reported. Migratory behaviors have not been reported, and this bird is presumed sedentary

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Despite its limited range, this bird is assessed by the IUCN red list as "Least Concern." This is due to the fact that its range primarily consists of protected areas and conditions which are difficult to reach. Therefore, it is largely unsusceptible to threats such as habitat loss and poaching
